About / 001

I run No Hard Feelings — a 365-day video journal where I show up on camera every single day.

Most UGC creators have to learn to be comfortable on camera. I already am. Daily content, new edits every 48 hours, and a real on-camera presence brands can trust to deliver. You hire one creator — you get a videographer too.
